title: Poster: Grow Your Money
subtitleProgress: Question {{current}} of {{total}}: Choose posters that promote smart investing!

stages.question: Which poster best encourages kids to save money?

choices.text: Small savings today, big dreams tomorrow! 🌱

stages.question: What poster best explains compounding to kids?

choices.text: Let your money work while you play! ⚙️
Spend it all in one place! 🎯

stages.question: Which poster teaches the best money-growing habit?

choices.text: Save first, spend later - watch money grow! 📈
Money is meant to be spent! 💸

stages.question: What poster shows the power of patience with money?

choices.text: Great things grow with time - including money! ⏳
Get rich quick with one trick! 🎩

stages.question: Which poster best explains why we should save?

choices.text: Money is for spending, not saving! 🛍️
You can always get more money! 💰
A rupee saved is a rupee that can grow! 🌟
